title: Eagle Stars geared for season
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Sedgefield PnP Eagle Stars...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Sedgefield PnP Eagle Stars RFC are gearing up for a thrilling new season, and the team are poised to make a significant impact in the league.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Sedgefield PnP Eagle Stars RFC are gearing up for a thrilling new season, and the team are poised to make a significant impact in the league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With pre-season training in full swing, the club are preparing to disrupt the competition, and reach new heights.","html":"With pre-season training in full swing, the club are preparing to disrupt the competition, and reach new heights."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Expert guidance","html":"Expert guidance"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to one of the members of the club, their players have been working tirelessly through intense training sessions, fine-tuning their skills, building strength, and fostering team cohesion under the expert guidance of rugby director Cliff Solomons."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"His wealth of experience has been crucial in shaping the team's direction and strategy for the upcoming season,\" the club member said.","html":"\"His wealth of experience has been crucial in shaping the team's direction and strategy for the upcoming season,\" the club member said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'New partnership'","html":"'New partnership'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Head coach Richard Voorslag, along with coach Jonathan Coetzee, has been ensuring that the players are in peak physical condition and ready to give their all on the field.","html":"\"Head coach Richard Voorslag, along with coach Jonathan Coetzee, has been ensuring that the players are in peak physical condition and ready to give their all on the field."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"One of the key factors behind the team's promising outlook for next season is a new partnership with Sedge Gym, whose state-of-the-art facilities the players have been utilising during their pre-season preparations.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This collaboration has provided Eagle Stars with the best resources available to take their fitness to the next level.","html":"This collaboration has provided Eagle Stars with the best resources available to take their fitness to the next level."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The gym's expert trainers are also working closely with the players to ensure they are stronger, faster, and more agile than ever before.","html":"The gym's expert trainers are also working closely with the players to ensure they are stronger, faster, and more agile than ever before."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Dedication is incredible'","html":"'Dedication is incredible'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We're committed to working hard and doing whatever it takes to make next season our best yet,\" said Voorslag. \"The team's dedication is incredible, and with the support of our partners like Sedge Gym, we're all set to challenge the league and exceed expectations.\"","html":"\"We're committed to working hard and doing whatever it takes to make next season our best yet,\" said Voorslag. \"The team's dedication is incredible, and with the support of our partners like Sedge Gym, we're all set to challenge the league and exceed expectations.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Solomons added that the team have made excellent progress during the pre-season. \"I am confident we'll see that translate into strong performances on the field. Our goal is to build on our past successes, disrupt the competition, and finish the season with a strong standing,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Sponsors' ongoing support'","html":"'Sponsors' ongoing support'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The team's hard work and ambition are not going unnoticed. The Eagle Stars are grateful for the ongoing support of their sponsors, including Pick n Pay, Sedge Gym, Talking Heads, Back2Gas, E4D Construction, BB Protection, Isolobatwana, and Hardnick Enterprise.","html":"\"The team's hard work and ambition are not going unnoticed. The Eagle Stars are grateful for the ongoing support of their sponsors, including Pick n Pay, Sedge Gym, Talking Heads, Back2Gas, E4D Construction, BB Protection, Isolobatwana, and Hardnick Enterprise."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Their contributions are vital to the success of the club, and Eagle Stars are proud to have such strong partnerships backing them as they aim for success.","html":"\"Their contributions are vital to the success of the club, and Eagle Stars are proud to have such strong partnerships backing them as they aim for success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Unforgettable impact'","html":"'Unforgettable impact'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"With a determined roster, great leadership, and the support of the local community and sponsors, the Sedgefield PnP Eagle Stars RFC are set to make an unforgettable impact in the league next season.\"","html":"\"With a determined roster, great leadership, and the support of the local community and sponsors, the Sedgefield PnP Eagle Stars RFC are set to make an unforgettable impact in the league next season.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
